items: Welcome by the School Board President

Oral Communication - If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening
Approval of Agreement for a Modernization Project with ICC at Adelante Selby School
Approval of Additional Legacy Closeout Support Proposal with WLC Architects at Clifford School
Approval of Tracking List for Measure T Bond Program Items Under $20K
Approval of Utility Fees with the City of Redwood City for Hoover School
Approval of Motorized Gate Proposal with A&D Auto Gate for North Star Academy
Approval of Portable Rental Agreement with Mobile Modular for Roosevelt School
Approval of Library Moving Services with Chipman for Taft School
Approval of Multi-Prime Construction Agreements with Various Contractors at Taft School
Adoption of Resolution 21, Resolution of Emergency Relating to Coronavirus (COVID-19)
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Agenda Schedule

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Staff recognition item added after item 5 (Oral Communication); moved from its original position in agenda
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: So moved. This is Maria. Is there a second? Second. Cecilia. Cecilia. And a roll call vote, please.
